creator: moosy
title: TailorKey v4.2m⁶ macOS Bilateral
notes:
🧿TK42m⁶BIL: https://sites.google.com/view/tailorkey
TailorKey is a zero-code, Glorious Engrammer–inspired layout that’s beginner-friendly yet fully pro-ready. 
It delivers a full set of advanced features, including:
• Advanced Home Row Mods with Bilateral Combinations Enforcement (Sunaku)
• Autoshift
• Symbol, Cursor, and Gaming Layers
• RGB Lighting (optional)
• Advanced Mouse Emulation
• Combo Keys

TailorKey leverages the Layout Editor’s powerful built-in (native) functions, enabling easy customization, or allows you to simply copy its capabilities to craft your own unique layout—all without relying on Custom-Defined Behaviors.

🖱️Mouse Emulation
Enable mouse emulation by turning on the HID_POINTING option under Advanced Configuration.
If you’re using mouse emulation for the first time, unpair the keyboard from all host computers and then re-pair it.

This zero-code layout is developed by @moosy. More information is available on https://sites.google.com/view/tailorkey
TailorKey is inspired by the fully featured Glorious Engrammer, developed by @sunaku. Please see https://github.com/sunaku/glove80-keymaps/releases for the Glorious Engrammer layout.

💡 Tip: Want to use only part of this layout (like Home-Row Mods or AutoShift)? Just copy the relevant layer—its associated macros and hold-tap actions will be included automatically.
📺 See how it's done here:  https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m72eTAEUWho

holdTaps.name: &AS_HT_v2_TKZ
holdTaps.description:
AutoShift Helper - &AS main macro is chained to &AS_HT hold tap and &AS_Shifted macro. For faster typists, it is recommended to decrease the tapping-term-ms value. A suggested value is 135 ms.
More: https://github.com/nickcoutsos/keymap-editor/wiki/Autoshift-using-ZMK-behaviors
